inline_comments.message:
This datamodel corresponds to approved ONAP VES specification (https://docs.onap.org/projects/onap-vnfrqts-requirements/en/latest/Chapter8/ves_7_2/ves_event_listener_7_2.html) and collector defaults include only what has been approved.

You can either use current - "notification" for your usecase or modify usecase deployment of VES to mount dynamic schema files (similar to stddefined domain as documented here - https://docs.onap.org/projects/onap-dcaegen2/en/latest/sections/services/ves-http/installation-helm.html#external-repository-schema-files-integration-with-ves-collector)
